title: Drone strike
description: Ukrainian forces hit chemical plant working for Russian military Drone operators from Ukraine's Unmanned Systems Forces have struck the Krymskyi Tytan chemical plant, whose products were used to manufacture gunpowder for the Russian armed forces. Read the full article on our website

title: Kyiv: 763 injured
description: UN records highest civilian casualty toll in Ukraine since 2022. The mission verified at least 274 civilian deaths and 1,763 injuries during the month, the highest monthly casualty toll recorded in the past four years.
description_en: UN records highest civilian casualty toll in Ukraine since 2022. The mission verified at least 274 civilian deaths and 1,763 injuries during the month, the highest monthly casualty toll recorded in the past four years.
description_uk: UN records highest civilian casualty toll in Ukraine since 2022. The mission verified at least 274 civilian deaths and 1,763 injuries during the month, the highest monthly casualty toll recorded in the past four years.

title: Air defense active
description: General Staff: the effectiveness of Ukrainian air defense in intercepting missiles and drones in May was at the level of more than 88%. In May alone, the Defense Forces of Ukraine destroyed more than 57 thousand enemy air attack vehicles. The level of efficiency of the Ukrainian air defense in May was 88-90%, said the speaker of the General Staff of the Ukrainian Armed Forces Andrey Kovalev.
description_en: General Staff: the effectiveness of Ukrainian air defense in intercepting missiles and drones in May was at the level of more than 88%. In May alone, the Defense Forces of Ukraine destroyed more than 57 thousand enemy air attack vehicles. The level of efficiency of the Ukrainian air defense in May was 88-90%, said the speaker of the General Staff of the Ukrainian Armed Forces Andrey Kovalev.
description_uk: Генштаб: эффективность украинской ПВО в перехвате ракет и дронов в мае была на уровне более 88% За один только май Силы обороны Украины уничтожили более 57 тысяч вражеских средств воздушного нападения. Уровень эффективности украинского ПВО в мае составил 88-90%, сообщил спикер Генерального штаба ВСУ Андрей Ковалев.

title: 101 missiles
description: Russian X-101 missiles have become less noticeable, more powerful and resistant to EW. Colonel Alexander Zaruba, the chief scientist of the State Research Institute of Weapons Testing and Certification, told about this at a briefing on the topic "Use of the Russian Air Force against Civilian Infrastructure: Technical and Humanitarian Aspects". According to him, the analysis of the debris of the last released by...

According to him, the analysis of the debris of the last released by...
description_uk: Российские ракеты Х-101 стали менее заметными, более мощными и устойчивыми к РЭБ Об этом на брифинге на тему "Применение РФ средств воздушного нападения против гражданской инфраструктуры: технические и гуманитарные аспекты" рассказал главный научный сотрудник Государственного НИИ испытаний и сертификации вооружения полковник Александр Заруба. title: Attack attack
description: Ukraine's security service reports hit on oil and gas terminal in Russia's Krasnodar Krai Special Group Alpha, part of the Security Service of Ukraine (SSU), working with Special Operations Forces (SOF) and Defence Intelligence of Ukraine (DIU), has carried out successful strikes on the Tamannaftogas oil and gas terminal in Russia's Krasnodar Krai. Read the full article on our website

title: Crimea: Attack attack
description: Ukraine reports new strikes on bridges linking Crimea with mainland. Ukrainian forces struck bridges linking occupied Crimea with Russian-held territory in mainland Ukraine overnight on June 13, a Ukrainian military unit confirmed.

description: 40 children remain without gas and water in occupied Oleshky, Kherson Oblast; 182 children in total in community Around 6,000 people, including 182 children, remain in the occupied Oleshky hromada. title: Casualties reported
description: May 2026 became the deadliest month for civilians in Ukraine in four years — UN In the past month, more civilians were killed and injured in Ukraine than in any other month in the past four years, the UN Monitoring Mission on Human Rights in Ukraine reported. The IMPCHU confirmed that as a result of the war unleashed by Russia, at least 274 people died in Ukraine in May, there were...

title: Kherson: Missile attack
description: Heavy fire in Kherson after the Russian airstrike. It is reported that about 8 anti-tank missiles flew into the city at once. There is no official information from the local authorities yet.

description: 110 ENEMY UAVS SHOT DOWN/SUPPRESSED On the night of June 13 (from 18:00 on June 12), the enemy attacked 118 attack UAVs of the Shahed type (including jet ones), Gerbera, Italmas, Barrage munitions "Banderol" and imitation drones of the "Parody" type from the directions: Orel, Kursk, Millerovo, Primorsko-Akhtarsk - Russian Federation, TOT Donetsk, Gvardiyske - TOT Autonomous Republic of Crimea. The air attack was repulsed by aviation, anti-aircraft...

title: Donetsk: Explosions reported
description: Russia reports third attack in a week on figures linked to war in Ukraine: former Donetsk People's Republic minister targeted – photos An explosion occurred at the Moscow residence of Andrei Pinchuk, the former so-called state security minister of the self-proclaimed DPR, after a courier delivered a parcel. Read the full article on our website

title: Sumy: Attack attack on infrastructure
